task.title: How to Subtract using JPS Calculater
task.shortdesc: Follow the below steps to subtract two or more numbers using the JPS Calculator.

prereq.p:
Make sure that:
You know what is subtraction and its symbol.

step.cmd: Enter the numbers that you want to subtract with the - symbol between them.

result.p: You can see a single number on the JPS Calculator screen. This number is the result.

taskbody.example: Enter 100 - 2 - 5 - 8 and press =. You can see 85 on the JPS Calculator screen.
